contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach the Causeartist team — partnerships, press, corrections, or general questions.

about.title: About Causeartist
about.description: Nonprofit media platform and directory for the impact economy — interviews, podcasts, and the most comprehensive database of impact companies and funders.

advertise.title: Sponsor Causeartist
advertise.description: Promote your brand on {siteName} and reach readers who care about impact companies, funders, and the future of business.

cta.title: Need a custom partnership?
cta.description: Tell us more about your company and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

success.title: Thank you for your payment!
success.description: Please complete your sponsorship setup by providing your company details.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Get access to the dashboard and manage your submitted tools.

errors.title: Sign-in could not complete
errors.ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: This sign-in link was used too many times or expired. Request a new magic link and open it once—preferably in a private/incognito window if your email provider scans links.
errors.generic: Something went wrong during sign-in. Request a new magic link and try again.

verify.title: Check your inbox
verify.description: Check your inbox to sign in to {siteName}.
verify.instructions: We've sent you a magic link to {email}. Please click the link to confirm your address and sign in.
verify.no_email: No email in your inbox? Check your spam folder or <link>try a different email address</link>.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Manage your account and tools on {siteName}.

tools.empty_state: No tools found. Submit or claim a tool to get started.

bookmarks.empty_state: No bookmarked tools yet. Browse tools and bookmark them to save for later.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: A collection of useful articles for developers and software enthusiasts. Learn about the latest trends and technologies in the community.

categories.title: Browse Categories
categories.description: Browse all tool categories to find the perfect software for your needs.

category.title: {name} Tools
category.description: A curated collection of the best {name}

tags.title: Browse Tags
tags.description: Browse all available tags to discover tools by specific features and capabilities.

tag.title: Tools tagged with "{name}"
tag.description: Explore tools and software tagged with {name} to find solutions that match your specific needs.

error.title: Something went wrong!
error.description: Please try again. If the problem persists, <link>contact support</link>.

not_found.title: 404 Not Found
not_found.description: We're sorry, but the page could not be found. You may have mistyped the address or the page may have moved.

submit.title: Add a free listing
submit.description: Listing on {siteName} is a great way to get more exposure for your tool. We only list high-quality tools that are useful for directory owners.

upgrade.title: Upgrade {name}'s Listing
upgrade.description: Upgrade {name}'s listing on {siteName} for more exposure, special features, and tailored packages—ranging from free listings to premium placement.

success.title: Thank you for submitting {name}!
success.description: We'll review {name}'s submission and publish it on {siteName} soon.
